title: Regime dossiers ship empty primary_baseline_summary -> DA blocks proposals as asserted-not-measured
why: In tick 15, the DA twice issued HIGH-severity BLOCKs because primary_baseline_summary is {} in the BEAR_QUIET dossier: any hypothesis claiming the chosen primary works in-regime is unsupported by a measured baseline. The hypothesizer cannot fix this (it only receives the dossier). The proposal only cleared review by reframing to an absolute within-set falsification criterion that does not reference a baseline. Systemic: every regime dossier ships an empty primary_baseline_summary, so relative-edge hypotheses are structurally un-passable. Populate the dossier with per-regime unconditioned baselines (n_trades, hit-rate, median fold Sharpe) for each available primary, point-in-time / firewall-safe.
value_rationale: Unblocks an entire class of relative-edge hypotheses and makes DA baseline objections resolvable rather than fatal.
